text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle is about more than just eating well. A balanced diet, rich in fruits, vegetables, and whole grains, provides the energy your body needs. Regular exercise, even just a 30-minute walk, strengthens your heart and improves your mood. Equally important is quality sleep—aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover. Don’t forget mental health: taking time to relax or talk to friends reduces stress. Finally, achieving a work-life balance is crucial. Set boundaries between your job and personal time to avoid burnout. By combining these habits, you can build a healthier and happier life.
